actions.intent: Take a clean lower-side setup clear before the ice investment.
Break the lower iced route early.
Continue lower route progress instead of generic clearing.
Break the crate route tax and bring the lower puppy to one-clear-away.
Extract the lower puppy before water catches the pivot.
Break the upper ice route for the second rescue.
Clear the upper route tax and stabilize dock.
Use a safe recovery clear during the pivot.
Finish the upper rescue route and win.

notes: Designer golden for the future-value exam: invest in lower ice early, rescue before water, then pivot through the upper ice route.
